name: Alice Fauconnet
bio_de: Alice Fauconnet is co-founder of New Roots, a vegan cheese company in the canton of Bern. With a background in social anthropology, she became vegan for animal liberation. She advocates for ethical, plant-based food options as social media manager, integrity director and public speaker.
bio_en: Alice Fauconnet is co-founder of New Roots, a vegan cheese company in the canton of Bern. With a background in social anthropology, she became vegan for animal liberation. She advocates for ethical, plant-based food options as social media manager, integrity director and public speaker.
